sentences.text: This section describes the ext:zce[] extension, which incorporates the compressed instruction-set extensions designed for microcontrollers.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zce[] Extension for Enhanced Instruction Compression

sentences.text: Unlike the ext:c[] extension, the ext:zce[] extension includes extensions that trade performance for code density.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zce[] Extension for Enhanced Instruction Compression

sentences.text: The ext:zce[] extension depends upon the extlink:zca[], extlink:zcb[], extlink:zcmp[], and extlink:zcmt[] extensions.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zce[] Extension for Enhanced Instruction Compression

sentences.text: If XLEN=32 and the F extension is present, the ext:zce[] extension additionally depends upon the extlink:zcf[] extension.
sentences.section: Preamble > ext:zce[] Extension for Enhanced Instruction Compression
